query: Detect tennis court and basketball court, Plot the distribution.

input.command:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
def solution():
    labels = ['tennis court', 'basketball court']
    data = [2, 2]
    fig = plt.figure(figsize=(6, 4))
    plt.bar(labels, data, color=['green', 'orange'])
    plt.title('Distribution of courts')
    plt.xlabel('Court Type')
    plt.ylabel('Count')
    return fig

final_answer: Here is the distribution plot of tennis courts and basketball courts.
